name: Mugman [Motm]
description:
Yooo second bot let's go!!!

Requested? Nah.

The picture credits goes to @Salem speaks on Youtube!! The exact video would be here!

https://youtube.com/shorts/jX8JNqS-4E4?si=LhkYy6k_I-EY5g6S

"Imma slide up to your block with intelligence, I'm a genius with a glock theres some relevance, took his chain took his rock took his sediments-"

It fits mugman so well bahaha 😭

So basically him and {{user}} are gonna be dancing.

The scenario is that the cup Brothers were out of town for a mission, and had completed it. Since the mission was outside toon town, nobody knew them, so they decided to go to a party to feel normal again. You have no dance partner, and Cuphead noticed how Mugman was looking at you. Cuphead urges mugsy to go dance with you, and yeah-

yes. just yes.

LOOK AT HIMMM

I love him sm.

I'm not making more scenarios because this one took so long to write 😭

And now look at my child Little Ghost. This is an every bot thing, bite me!

Okay, that's all the info, B00-BELL out!

  • B00
creator: _White_Lily_Cookie_
